","2026-03-27T15:36:28.629Z","2026-03-28T11:33:59.493Z","claude-sonnet-4-5","isAgentConversation","a|Y","b|T","o|Z|a","n|0","96a3effa-0fc7-4da8-9265-d9b3924f7aea","request_id","uuid","chatItemType","status","fromTimestamp","toTimestamp","seen_state","a|e|f|g|h|i|j|k","2eac21bd-9164-4d35-9319-71d8b6241ff5","937f3735-6409-4dab-8550-12e9ba27ffa0","agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","success","n|VF5AxKp","seen","o|l|m|n|o|p|c|q|r","exchangeUuid","timestamp","request_message","a|g|t|u|v|h|k","exchange-pointer","c7f8193d-9a8f-4b70-880e-36ef131ba630","2026-03-27T15:37:02.192Z","is this is the correct gitignore to ignore the all docs folder and it's content ??","o|w|x|y|z|10|p|r","a|g|t|v|h","d3426360-522c-44ac-a6f0-50e89df0ecff","","o|12|x|13|14|p","ce363f94-3d60-4cd6-9e5b-ce5ee95eb7ad","2026-03-27T15:37:05.667Z","o|w|x|16|17|14|p|r","e941cc4a-2a91-4847-a7a7-79ea5ca08416","2026-03-27T15:37:44.502Z","will thsi ignore it ??
**/docs/","o|w|x|19|1A|1B|p|r","5e4ded3e-f04d-4217-a366-19ef363fdc76","2026-03-28T11:30:25.011Z","ignore all the files to be push from the folder .vscode/ and .idea/","o|w|x|1D|1E|1F|p|r","temp-fe-59f8c3f8-07aa-420c-bdce-30cbfb2094a3","2026-03-28T11:30:28.541Z","cancelled","o|w|x|1H|1I|14|1J|r","a|e|h|g","19265d92-89e8-459d-9f81-b39418bbb40d","agentic-turn-delimiter","o|1L|1M|1J|1N","5bdddbfe-7d5b-4c31-90b2-8a46944aa34d","2026-03-28T11:30:39.552Z","Give it to me, I will do it manually","o|w|x|1P|1Q|1R|p|r","74f51417-195c-43ea-8983-5507e785b7b6","2026-03-28T11:31:51.014Z","There are two .idea/, on in parent level and other in child lavel, what to do, git it to me","o|w|x|1T|1U|1V|p|r","b049846c-3135-4f4a-b4ca-5488643181b1","2026-03-28T11:33:14.822Z","Why still this file is coming in commit history, i have mke this file ignore inder .idea/ folder","o|w|x|1X|1Y|1Z|p|r","44052494-6aae-48da-8647-b4587f861800","2026-03-28T11:33:59.494Z","abhayk@MBP-Q2G9QN7C1Y Nexus-Cloud-Native-Enterprise-Platform % git rm --cached .idea/AugmentWebviewStateStore.xml

error: the following file has staged content different from both the
file and the HEAD:

(use -f to force removal)
